Showing ID to prove that you’re an eligible voter doesn’t disenfranchise Americans, it protects the integrity of their vote.


Rasmussen Reports (@Rasmussen_Poll)

How likely is it that cheating affected the outcome of the 2020 presidential election?

What would happen if China invaded Taiwan while the U.S. was still engaged in Iran? Right now, our military is ill-equipped to sustain two theaters of war, despite a threat landscape that demands the ability to do so.

On my latest podcast, @LarryOConnor and I review @Heritage’s 2026 Index of U.S. Military Strength, which outlines the policies necessary to restore American military readiness.

Get the episode wherever you listen to your podcasts or on my YouTube channel: piped.video/Y6UHviCRSgI
